hero.subtitle: Two decades of building the methodologies, governance frameworks, and KPI systems that turn nature-based solutions from concept into city-wide reality.

about.bio_para1: I'm a **spatial planning and climate adaptation professional** who has spent two decades translating complex urban challenges into implementable strategies for cities. My work sits at the intersection of environmental policy, data-driven decision-making, and cross-stakeholder governance.
about.bio_para2: As former **Head of Environmental & Sustainable Planning** at Haifa Municipality, I established a new department from the ground up, led the city's first Climate Adaptation Action Plan, and introduced GIS-based workflows for climate risk mapping and spatial prioritization.
about.bio_para3: Now based in **the Netherlands**, I bring a unique blend: the strategic vision to define what needs measuring and why, the governance fluency to navigate public sector procurement, and the implementation drive to push strategies from paper to the ground.
about.quote: I don't just write plans — I build the methodology, define the KPIs, align the stakeholders, and drive implementation.

expertise.heading: How I Create Value
expertise.subtitle: Strategic advisory at the nexus of urban nature, climate data, and governance — bridging innovation with implementation.

cards.title: NBS Strategy & Methodology
cards.description: Building 0-to-1 frameworks for nature-based solutions — from problem definition and methodology design to KPI structures and governance mechanisms.

cards.title: Climate Adaptation Planning
cards.description: Developing adaptation action plans integrating flood mitigation, urban heat reduction, coastal resilience, and energy transition into statutory processes.

cards.title: Spatial Data & Decision Support
cards.description: Defining what to measure and why — structuring GIS-based workflows and decision-support frameworks that translate data into actionable measures.

cards.title: Stakeholder Governance
cards.description: Leading cross-functional processes across municipal departments, ministries, consultants, academia, and international networks from vision to execution.

cards.title: Urban Planning & Regeneration
cards.description: Strategic planning for high-density mixed-use development, urban renewal, and sustainable building policy within statutory master plans.

cards.title: International Advisory
cards.description: Bringing global best practices to local implementation through C40 and ICLEI networks, translating EU frameworks into concrete municipal action.

impact.label: Featured Impact
impact.title: Building a City's Green Resilience from Zero
impact.description: Established a new municipal department from the ground up — building the team, methodology, and governance framework for integrating climate resilience and nature-based solutions into metropolitan spatial policy.

phases.label: Challenge
phases.title: No Existing Framework
phases.text: The city had no dedicated environmental planning capacity — no methodology, no KPIs, no cross-departmental governance for climate adaptation.

phases.label: Approach
phases.title: 0→1 Methodology & Governance
phases.text: Designed the methodology, assembled a multidisciplinary team, defined KPIs and monitoring, coordinated 5+ partners on a city-wide action plan.

phases.label: Outcome
phases.title: Measurable Transformation
phases.text: Delivered the city's first Climate Adaptation Action Plan, Urban Nature Strategy, and Forestry Master Plan with annual monitoring and multi-million budget pipeline.

contact.heading: Let's build resilient cities together

cards.title: For Employers & Recruiters
cards.text: Seeking a Principal IC / Lead Strategist role in the Dutch climate adaptation and NBS ecosystem — defining methodologies, leading client engagement, driving real-world impact.

cards.title: For Consulting Opportunities
cards.text: Available for strategic advisory on urban resilience, NBS program design, climate adaptation frameworks, and stakeholder governance across Europe.

cards.title: For Speaking & Workshops
cards.text: Experienced speaker at C40 and ICLEI forums. Available for keynotes, panels, and stakeholder workshop facilitation.

contact.subtitle: Whether you're a municipality, consultancy, or tech firm navigating climate adaptation — I'd love to explore collaboration.
